items.title: Can Consumer TVs be used for Digital Signage instead of Professional Screens?
items.description: Discover when consumer TVs work for digital signage and when professional displays are better for reliability, brightness, and long-term use.

items.title: What are E-ink Displays and How Do They Compare to Regular Digital Signage
items.description: Discover how e-ink displays deliver energy-efficient, glare-free, sun-readable signage and compare with traditional digital screens.

items.title: Signagelive and Screenfeed Connect Take Centre Stage in Marlowe Theatre’s Digital Signage Project
items.description: Kent’s Largest Theatre Boosts Customer Experience with Signagelive and Screenfeed Connect The Marlowe Theatre – Kent’s largest theatre – has given Signagelive and Screenfeed a leading rol…

items.title: How Bright Should My Digital Signage Screens Be?
items.description: Learn the ideal brightness for digital signage screens indoors, outdoors, and window-facing, plus tips on display types and auto-brightness sensors.

items.title: What Makes Digital Cloud Signage a Scalable Solution for Enterprise Businesses?
items.description: Discover how digital cloud signage helps enterprises scale networks, streamline content management, boost efficiency, and secure multi-location screens.

items.title: The Business of AV – Solving Support & Maintenance Problems with Faye Bennett
items.description: This episode of Digital Signage Explored features Faye Bennett, founder and managing director of Faye Bennett Consultancy Services.

items.title: How Energy Efficient is Digital Signage?
items.description: Discover how energy-efficient digital signage is. Compare CMS options, display types, and SoC vs media players to cut costs and boost sustainability.

items.title: How Long Does Digital Signage Last?
items.description: Discover how long digital signage lasts, from CMS and displays to SoC and media players with tips to maximise lifespan and ROI

items.title: A New Era of Experience and AI [+VIDEO]
items.description: Mark Coxon, XTG, provides valuable insight into the role of human experience and AI in the future of digital signage.

items.title: How Much Does Digital Signage Cost?
items.description: Discover digital signage costs, enterprise features, hardware tips, and software advice to plan your screens and save money effectively.
